assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8: '## Repository Registry' heading followed by a table with two rows: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' and '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. Both repositories are present with their correct Serena instance names.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: '## Jira Configuration' heading followed by all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 18-29: '## Code Intelligence' heading followed by 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and a concrete example using 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' subheading appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), correctly nested under it.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 15-18: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances:' followed by '1. **serena_backend**' and '2. **serena_ui**'. Line 14 confirms discovery from MCP tool listing: 'Source: MCP tool listing in `mcp-tools-with-serena.md`'. Line 15 confirms method: 'Discovery method: Scanned for tools matching the `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 3-7 document preserved content: 'Preserved Content' section lists '`# my-project` heading and description — preserved', '`## Documentation` section with architecture and API doc links — preserved', '`## Getting Started` section with setup instructions — preserved'. While all Project Configuration subsections were newly added (lines 14-37), the log indicates 3 sections were preserved, not a pure greenfield setup. The assertion requires 'no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup' but the changes-log shows preserved pre-existing content.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — the table header contains exactly the four required columns in the correct order.
